title: Are Wall Street Analysts Bullish on Datadog Stock?
text: Wall Street Analyst Sentiment on Datadog Stock. Analyst Ratings Consensus: Among 45 analysts covering DDOG stock the consensus is a Strong Buy based on 39 Strong Buy ratings three Moderate Buys two Holds and one Strong Sell. Price Targets: The mean price target of 216.35 represents an 8.2 percent premium to DDOG's current price levels. Another source shows 33 analysts have a consensus rating of Strong Buy and an average price target of 204.82 which forecasts a 2.33 percent increase in the stock price over the next year. Financial Guidance: DDOG expects full-year adjusted EPS in the range of 2.36 to 2.44 and revenue ranging from 4.30 billion to 4.34 billion. Recent Performance and Sentiment: On May 7 DDOG shares surged 31.3 percent after reporting its Q1 results. Its adjusted EPS of 0.60 topped Wall Street expectations of 0.50. The company's revenue was 1 billion topping Wall Street forecasts of 956.9 million. Market Outlook: Datadog has outperformed the broader market considerably over the past year and analysts are highly optimistic about the stock's prospects.
